memory.summary:
On November 27th, Andy had additional discussions. He met Peter at a train station around 5 AM, where they discussed an upcoming AI music project meeting at Caroline's Café the following day at 2 PM to further collaborate. Since Andy also had a meeting with Mei regarding their AI project at the same café the next day at 1 PM, he suggested combining both meetings.

Later, Andy spoke with Mei at a theater around 7 PM and agreed to discuss community garden and zine club matters during their Saturday meet-up at the park instead of Caroline's Café. They also planned to have vegan street tacos as Leo suggested before their meeting.

data.content: Talked to Samantha at home around 2025-11-27 08:00

Andy: Good morning, Samantha! I didn't expect to see you here so early. It's a beautiful day for some art, isn't it?

Samantha: Morning, Andy. I saw the sunrise through the window on my way here. I thought you might appreciate it.

Andy: Ah, you always know how to find me! So, we have our usual meeting at the park this Saturday, right?

Samantha: Yes, and I brought the headphones as promised. We'll discuss our AI project and other community matters then.

Andy: That sounds perfect. Let's grab some coffee beforehand to kickstart our creativity. Shall we meet at Caroline's Café at 9 AM on Saturday?

Samantha: Agreed, that works for me. See you there!
Talked to Caroline at library around 2025-11-27 10:00

Andy: Hey Caroline! I see you're whipping up some beautiful latte art again. How's the day been?

Caroline: Hi Andy, always a pleasure to see your cheerful face at the library. The day has been quite busy, but I can't complain with all these interesting conversations about AI projects!

Andy: Absolutely! We had a productive meeting with Mei yesterday regarding our collaborative project. How about we catch up and maybe discuss some more ideas over your famous tea? Let's make it tomorrow at 12:30, if that works for you?

Caroline: That sounds perfect, Andy! I'm looking forward to it. Let's meet under the oak tree by my café so we can grab a cup of tea before heading over to our discussion spot. See you there tomorrow at 12:30 sharp!
Talked to Peter at market around 2025-11-27 12:00

Andy: Hey Peter! Fancy seeing you here at the market. Wasn't expecting our paths to cross today.

Peter: Andy! Just the artist I wanted to run into. You know, we've got that AI meeting coming up at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 2 PM, right?

Andy: Absolutely, looking forward to it. By the way, Noor and Mei will be joining us as well for a coffee discussion of our AI project beforehand, and then we might catch up with Samantha under the oak tree on Tuesday at 1 PM.

Peter: Sounds like a productive day ahead! I'll see you tomorrow at Caroline's Café then. Let's make it official – Andy, Peter, Samantha, Noor, and Diego at Caroline's Café tomorrow at 2 PM sharp.
Talked to Diego at cafe around 2025-11-27 14:00

Andy: Hey Diego, great running into you here! I was just thinking about our AI projects again. We should really sync up soon.

Diego: Hey Andy! Fancy seeing you here. I've been meaning to discuss the progress on my knee injury and the AI music project with you. How about we meet next Wednesday, November 30th, at 2 PM at Caroline's Café? What do you think?

Andy: That sounds perfect, Diego! See you then. And maybe we can grab some tea too if you're up for it.
Talked to Peter at market around 2025-11-27 15:00

Andy: Hey Peter, great running into you! Mei and I were just discussing our AI project and it looks like we might need your input too. How about we meet tomorrow at Caroline's Café at 2 PM to hash things out?

Peter: Sounds good, Andy. That's right after my meeting with Diego anyway. Let's grab some food together at Street Taco Cafe afterwards, if you're free?

Andy: Absolutely! I've got a quadruple date planned for the 27th, but after that, I'm all yours. Looking forward to it!

Peter: Awesome, I'll send you a reminder. And hey, maybe we can talk about your solo gallery show dream too? That's if you don't mind sharing, of course.

Andy: Always open to sharing my dreams with you, Peter. See you tomorrow then!

memory.summary: On November 26th, Samantha met with Diego at a cafe and discussed her AI music project progress, later rescheduling their meeting for under the oak tree in the park the next day at 1 PM. She also met Andy at the library around 11:00 PM to discuss the project. On November 27th, Samantha encountered Peter at the park early in the morning, where they shared an unexpected meeting. Peter expressed interest in their AI project and suggested a collaboration, inviting him to join them under the oak tree the next day at 1 PM. Samantha agreed and both parties confirmed their presence at the meeting.

memory.summary:
On November 27th, the AI project discussion between Caroline, Samantha, and Mei takes place at a library, with additional discussions occurring outside of it. Caroline invites Noor to her café for a catch-up and discussion about the AI music project at 4 PM sharp on the following day. Meanwhile, she discusses ideas for the AI project with Mei over lunch the next day at her café, setting their meeting time for 1 PM sharp to avoid interfering with Mei's Saturday club meeting.

In a subsequent conversation at the library on November 27th at around 9 AM, Samantha thanks Caroline for the cat food and updates her about the progress made in the AI music project during their meeting with Diego the previous night. Samantha proposes a meeting at Caroline's Café next Tuesday at 3 PM to discuss further, and Caroline invites Mei to join them for lunch the following day as well. Samantha agrees to meet under the oak tree in the park tomorrow at 1 PM, as originally planned. Peter visits Caroline's café early in the morning, appreciating her latte art and cozy vibe.

Caroline: That sounds perfect, Andy! I'm looking forward to it. Let's meet under the oak tree by my café so we can grab a cup of tea before heading over to our discussion spot. See you there tomorrow at 12:30 sharp!

memory.summary:
On November 26th, Peter communicates with multiple individuals about various AI projects and social gatherings. He reschedules his meeting about the AI project progress with Diego to be held next Tuesday at Caroline's Café at 3 PM sharp, followed by vegan street tacos afterward. After their conversation, Diego proposes meeting at Street Taco Cafe for those tacos after their meeting on Tuesday, a plan which Peter accepts.

They will meet at Caroline's Café at 2 PM sharp next Tuesday as previously planned. During a separate encounter on November 27th at the park, Peter discusses with Caroline about the AI music project she is working on with Samantha. Caroline updates him on the progress and informs him that he has been invited to join her coffee meeting tomorrow.

Peter (looking hopeful): "That sounds promising! Perhaps this collaboration could be the fresh start our projects need. How about we meet there too? I'd like to discuss some ideas with you."

Samantha: "I'd be happy to, Peter. See you tomorrow then, at 1 PM under the oak tree."

memory.summary: On November 26, Mei and Andy meet at the library where Andy shows Mei some sketches and seeds for the community garden. They decide to reschedule their planned quadruple date to discuss their collaborative AI project. The new meeting will take place at Caroline's Café on November 27 at 1 PM, which aligns with everyone else's schedules. Mei also arranges an additional meeting with Caroline at the same café at 2 PM for discussions about their AI music project over lunch. Their updated schedule now includes: November 25, November 30 @ Caroline's Café, December 1 @ a café under the oak tree at 2 PM and at Caroline's Café at 1 PM (rescheduled from 7 PM due to Mei's request), and additional lunch meetings afterwards. The quadruple date is still scheduled for Saturday at the park. On November 27, they also have plans to meet at the market around 1 AM.

memory.summary:
On November 26th, 2025, Diego met Samantha unexpectedly at a train station and discussed various topics including her cat feeding efforts and his knee injury. They agreed to meet at Caroline's Café on Wednesday, November 30th for an AI music project discussion. Diego later also made plans with Peter to meet next Tuesday at Caroline's Café for an AI project discussion followed by vegan street tacos.

On the following day, Diego spoke with Caroline at the gym around 2 AM and she invited him to a meeting about her music project the next day (November 27th) at 1 PM, suggesting they reschedule it to 2 PM so Diego could have dinner beforehand. Diego agreed and suggested inviting Peter as well since he's also involved in the AI project. The updated schedule now includes a meeting with all three at Caroline's Café next Tuesday (December 6th) at 2 PM, followed by dinner at Street Taco Cafe.

memory.summary:
On November 26th, Noor reschedules meetings for various projects, including one earlier than planned with Andy for a coffee catch-up ahead of their AI project meeting under the oak tree next Tuesday. Andy suggests a meeting at Caroline's Café to discuss his latest music project with Noor and Samantha, which they agree to attend. Diego proposes a meeting next Friday at 3 PM at Street Taco Cafe for their zine club project, and Noor agrees, suggesting a change in schedule for both projects at Caroline's Café on the following day.

On November 27th, Andy unexpectedly runs into Noor at the hospital. They decide to meet at Caroline's Café an hour later, where they will discuss their AI project and music collaboration with Peter and Samantha. Noor plans to bring her laptop and some snacks for the students. Additionally, Andy proposes a double date under the oak tree over the weekend.

memory.summary:
On November 26th, Leo meets Andy in the morning at Caroline's Café for an AI discussion and encounters Samantha at a train station around 9 AM. They decide to catch up on their AI project and personal matters over coffee the next day, November 27th, at 1 PM at Caroline's Café. During their conversation at the train station, they agree to discuss further planning for their AI project before Samantha's meeting with Noor. Leo reminds Samantha not to forget her noise-cancelling headphones.

Later that day, Leo runs into Diego at a train station around 6 PM and learns that he has updates regarding the AI project for the zine club. Diego invites Leo to join him and Peter to discuss further at Caroline's Café on the same day at 2 PM. Leo agrees and plans to make it a double date, given his other meeting with Noor and Andy the next day.

data.content: Talked to Diego at home around 2025-11-26 19:00

Diego: Hey Leo, long time no see! I heard you've been busking some new tunes lately.

Leo: Indeed, Diego! And how have your gym and EMT adventures been keeping you? The knee holding up?

Diego: Almost there, just a few more weeks of physical therapy. Speaking of which, I should really stretch now.

Leo: Well, don't rush off just yet. Let's grab some street tacos later to celebrate your recovery and catch up on our AI projects for the zine club. How about tomorrow at 2 PM at Caroline's Café? It fits perfectly between my theater work and your gym class.

Diego: Sounds great, Leo! I'll see you there tomorrow at 2 PM sharp, then. And don't forget to bring your violin for a little impromptu duet!
Talked to Andy at gym around 2025-11-26 20:00

Andy:
Hey Leo, it's great running into you here! I was thinking about our musical collaboration and wanted to touch base. Did we set a specific date for that coffee meet-up at Caroline's?

Leo:
Oh, Andy! It's nice seeing you too. Yes, we were planning on that catch-up next Thursday at 2 PM, right after my appointment. How about you? I heard about your busy schedule lately with the AI project and community work.

Andy:
Sounds good to me! I'll make sure to be there for our discussion. By the way, have you tried those vegan street tacos at the park? We could grab a bite before our meeting if you're up for it. What do you think?

Leo:
Count me in! Vegan street tacos sound delicious and catching up over some food would be perfect. Let's plan to meet at 1 PM sharp, then. See you on Thursday under the oak tree!
Talked to Noor at train_station around 2025-11-26 21:00

Noor: Hey Leo! Great timing, I was just thinking about our AI project discussion tomorrow. Shall we meet at Caroline's Café at 3 PM sharp as planned?

Leo: Absolutely, Noor! Looking forward to it. And by the way, did you manage to grab those snacks for the students like we discussed earlier?

Noor: Yes, of course! I have them with me right now. Let's catch up after this meeting tomorrow then, at the café?

Leo: That sounds perfect. See you there tomorrow at 4 PM sharp, Noor.

(Added to their schedules: 2025-11-27 16:00 @ cafe: Catching up after AI project discussion)
Talked to Peter at hospital around 2025-11-26 22:00
